findings.summary: RPiISA v2 schematic parsed correctly: 4 components, ISA bus + RPi + crystal oscillator; Crystal oscillator Y1 not detected in crystal_circuits; single_pin_nets correctly reported for unconnected IS...

correct.description: Simple adapter board with Bus_ISA_8bit (J1), Raspberry_Pi_2_3 (J2), DIP-20 connector (J3), and 14.318MHz crystal oscillator (Y1). Component types, power rails (GND/VCC), and 23 no-connects are correct for a minimal ISA bus adapter.
The connectivity_issues.single_pin_nets section correctly flags ISA bus signals that are exported from J1 but not connected to other components in this minimal schematic.

missed.description: Y1 is a 14.318MHz clock oscillator (ACH-14.31818MHZ-EK, 4-pin oscillator module). The signal_analysis.crystal_circuits array is empty, even though there is a crystal/oscillator component. The ACH part is a 4-pin CMOS oscillator, not a 2-pin crystal, but it should still be detected as a clock source.

findings.summary: ISARPiv2 legacy schematic parsed with 12 components: ISA bus, RPi connector, 8 pull-up resistors, crystal oscillator; Crystal oscillator Y1 not detected in crystal_circuits for ISARPiv2

correct.description: Component count and types (3 connectors, 8 resistors, 1 crystal) are correct. The 8 resistors (R10-R17, value 100 ohm) are bus termination/pull-up resistors consistent with ISA bus design.

missed.description: Same issue as the v2 schematic — 14.318MHz crystal oscillator Y1 is present but crystal_circuits is empty.

findings.summary: ISAMEM schematic parsed correctly: 3 components (ISA bus connector, AS6C4008 SRAM, 10uF cap); ERC warning for V5 net correctly flagged as no_driver (power rail without a PWR_FLAG); AS6C4008 SRAM no...

correct.description: AS6C4008-55PCN CMOS SRAM correctly identified as IC. ISA bus connector correct. Only GND power rail (no VCC power symbol, only through ISA connector pins) is accurately reflected.
V5 connects ISA VCC pins to SRAM VCC but has no power symbol driver — the ERC correctly identifies this as a net with power_in pins but no power source symbol.

missed.description: IC3 is an AS6C4008-55PCN, a 512K x 8 CMOS SRAM with a standard parallel address/data bus interface. memory_interfaces is empty. The SRAM's 20-bit address bus (A0-A19) and 8-bit data bus (D0-D7) connecting to the ISA bus should be detectable as a memory interface.

findings.summary: PCB v2 correctly parsed: 4 THT footprints, 2-layer, 81.3x33.8mm ISA card form factor

correct.description: 4 through-hole components, 62 nets, 319 track segments, 12 vias, fully routed. The board dimensions match a standard ISA card form factor.

findings.summary: ISARPiv2 PCB correctly parsed: 12 footprints (9 SMD + 3 THT), 2-layer, same ISA form factor; Edge clearance warnings for J2 and J3 correctly flagged (negative clearance = outside board outline)

correct.description: 12 components matching schematic count, mixed SMD/THT, 45 nets, fully routed. Courtyard overlap between Y1 and J3 (98.6mm²) is a real DFM issue that the PCB analyzer correctly flags.

J2 (RPi header, -19.4mm) and J3 (DIP socket, -3.8mm) have negative edge clearance, meaning their courtyards extend beyond the board edge. This is intentional for an ISA slot connector that overhangs the board edge, but the flagging is correct.

findings.summary: ISAMEM PCB correctly parsed: 3 footprints, 2-layer, 81.28x39.37mm, fully routed

correct.description: 3 components (SRAM DIP-32, ISA connector, decoupling cap), 32 nets, 208 tracks, 16 vias, fully routed. Matches the simple SRAM card design.
